Data Analyst.description: Analyze data to help organizations make informed business decisions

steps.description: Master advanced Excel functions, pivot tables, and data manipulation
Learn SQL for querying databases and data retrieval
Master Python with Pandas, NumPy for data manipulation
Create compelling visualizations with Matplotlib, Seaborn, and Tableau
Build 3-4 portfolio projects demonstrating your skills

Machine Learning Engineer.description: Build and deploy machine learning models at scale

steps.description: Strong Python foundation including OOP and best practices
Linear algebra, calculus, probability, and statistics fundamentals
Core ML algorithms, model evaluation, and scikit-learn

resources.name: Machine Learning by Andrew Ng - Coursera

steps.description: Neural networks, CNNs, RNNs, and transformers
Model deployment, monitoring, and CI/CD for ML
Build end-to-end ML projects with deployment

Frontend Developer.description: Build user interfaces and client-side web applications

steps.description: Master semantic HTML and CSS layout techniques
Core JavaScript including ES6+ features and DOM manipulation
Build component-based UIs with React and hooks
Modern CSS with Tailwind, Sass, and CSS-in-JS
Add type safety to JavaScript applications
Testing React applications with Jest and React Testing Library

Backend Developer.description: Build server-side applications, APIs, and database systems

steps.description: Master a backend language (Python, Node.js, or Java)
SQL and NoSQL databases with design principles
Build RESTful APIs with proper design patterns
Implement caching strategies and optimize performance
Deploy applications with Docker and CI/CD

Full Stack Developer.description: Build complete web applications from frontend to backend

steps.description: Work with SQL and NoSQL databases
Add type safety to full stack applications

Data Scientist.description: Extract insights from data using statistics and machine learning

steps.description: Master Python with NumPy, Pandas, and Jupyter
Query databases and work with big data tools
Neural networks and deep learning fundamentals

DevOps Engineer.description: Build and maintain CI/CD pipelines, infrastructure, and cloud systems

steps.description: Master Linux administration and Bash scripting
Advanced Git workflows and branching strategies
Automate infrastructure with Terraform and Ansible
Master at least one major cloud platform

Cloud Engineer.description: Design, implement, and manage cloud infrastructure

steps.description: Learn core services of major cloud platform
Monitor cloud resources and optimize costs
Get certified and build portfolio projects

Software Engineer.description: Design and build software systems using engineering principles

steps.description: Master DSA for problem-solving and interviews

AI/ML Engineer.description: Build and deploy AI/ML systems for production applications

steps.description: Advanced Python including OOP and best practices
Linear algebra, calculus, probability, and statistics
Natural Language Processing and Large Language Models
Image and video processing with deep learning
Build applications with LangChain, RAG, etc.

Product Manager.description: Lead product strategy and development for tech products

steps.description: Use data to drive product decisions
Understand technical concepts for better collaboration
Build PM portfolio and get certified

Cybersecurity Analyst.description: Protect organizations from cyber threats and security breaches

steps.description: Strong foundation in IT and networking
Deep understanding of network protocols and architecture
Core security concepts and CompTIA Security+
Get certified and build a portfolio

Mobile Developer.description: Build native and cross-platform mobile applications

beginner.focus: Learn one platform deeply (iOS or Android) or cross-platform framework

intermediate.focus: Advanced patterns, state management, native integrations

Data Engineer.description: Design and build data pipelines and infrastructure

beginner.focus: SQL mastery, Python, basic ETL concepts

intermediate.focus: Distributed systems, cloud data services, orchestration

advanced.focus: Real-time streaming, data mesh, cost optimization

Database Administrator.description: Manage, optimize, and secure database systems

beginner.focus: SQL mastery, database fundamentals, basic administration

advanced.focus: High availability, disaster recovery, cloud databases

UI/UX Designer.description: Design user interfaces and experiences for digital products

intermediate.focus: User research, design systems, advanced prototyping

QA Engineer.description: Ensure software quality through testing and automation

beginner.focus: Testing fundamentals, manual testing, test cases

Technical Lead.description: Lead technical teams and drive architectural decisions

Systems Architect.description: Design large-scale software systems and infrastructure

Business Analyst.description: Bridge business needs with technical solutions

intermediate.focus: Process modeling, data analysis, solution design
